  Source Truth — src is canonical

    √ src_impl_archive/ does not exist — source migration complete (1 ms)
    √ no production file in src/ imports from src_impl_archive (413 ms)
  Docs — final release language
    √ VEX_FINAL_RELEASE_SCOPE.md exists
    × VEX_FINAL_RELEASE_SCOPE.md uses final-release language (2 ms)
    √ VEX_PRODUCT_CONSTITUTION.md exists (1 ms)
    √ FINAL_RELEASE_BLOAT_FIREWALL.md exists (1 ms)
    √ FINAL_RELEASE_FEATURE_CLASSIFICATION.md exists

  ● Docs — final release language › VEX_FINAL_RELEASE_SCOPE.md uses final-release language

    expect(received).not.toContain(expected) // indexOf

    Expected substring: not "Final Release Includes"
    Received string:        "# VEX Final Release Scope

    AI agents must read this file before editing Home, navigation, onboarding,
    session completion, premium, notifications, Coach Presence, Study/Deep Work,
    Boss, or feature availability.

    ## Product Identity

    VEX is a personalized Study + Focus execution OS. The final release is a
    personal execution loop, not a social game, economy, or feature museum.

    Primary loop:

    1. Onboarding selects goal and motivation style.
    2. Home adapts around one primary action.
    3. User starts a focus, study, or deep-work session.
    4. User completes the session.
    5. Coach Presence reflects, progress updates, and one next action appears.
    6. User has a clear reason to return tomorrow.

    ## Final Release Includes

    - Onboarding and motivation style selection.
    - Adaptive Home with one primary CTA.
    - Focus session start and completion.
    - Session completion ledger, streak, XP, and basic progress.
    - Basic Coach Presence.
    - Basic companion visual as the visual coach.
    - Study OS / Deep Work / Learning / Project Focus entry.
    - Subtle boss or momentum visual when relevant.
    - Basic settings, privacy, delete/export account paths.
    - Sentry-backed error capture.
    - RevenueCat-backed premium only when live billing is configured.

    ## Final Release Excludes

    These systems are archived/deactivated. Do not revive unless the user directly asks for that exact system by name:

    - shop
    - inventory
    - battle pass
    - wagers
    - rivals
    - squads/social
    - leaderboards
    - premium currency
    - advanced economy
    - guilds
    - community boss
    - seasonal/liveops systems

    ## Progressive Unlocking

    - Day 0: no full boss screen, no social, no shop, no economy, no premium hard sell.
    - First session complete: show proof, Coach Presence, progress, and next action.
    - Sessions 2-4: show rhythm and one small future preview.
    - Sessions 5-7: show a relevant path, not a wall of locked systems.
    - Power users: deeper systems may appear only through FeatureAvailability.

    FeatureAvailability is mandatory for routes, queries, notifications, entry
    points, event subscriptions, and background work.

    ## Home Density Rules

    - Home has one primary CTA.
    - Early Home has at most one spotlight.
    - Home must never route to unavailable features.
    - Coach and companion appear as one Coach Presence surface.
    - Boss is subtle for calm/study users and visible only for game-like/intense or
      later-stage users.
    - Study language adapts by primary goal:
      Study OS, Deep Work Plan, Learning OS, Project Focus Path, or Growth Path.

    ## Completion Source Of Truth

    - Core completion mutation happens once through the session-completion ledger.
    - UI display must not grant XP, rewards, currency, streaks, or boss damage.
    - Duplicate completion events must not duplicate rewards.
    - Optional feature effects run only when FeatureAvailability allows event
      subscription.
    - Optional failures are logged and shown as degraded, but completion still
      succeeds when core save succeeds.

    ## Premium Honesty

    Free VEX must include starting sessions, completing sessions, basic progress,
    basic Coach Presence, basic companion visual, and basic Study/Deep Work entry.

    Premium sells deeper personalization:

    - Deep Coach Memory.
    - Advanced Study / Deep Work OS.
    - Personal Progress Intelligence.
    - Visual identity.
    - Premium session modes.

    Never show fake billing, fake premium, fake plans, premium currency, or cheap
    \"upgrade now\" copy. If billing is not live, hide premium or show a clear
    unavailable state.

    ## Archived Feature Runtime Rules

    Every archived/deactivated feature must be fully inert at runtime:
    - Must not register routes.
    - Must not render Home cards.
    - Must not trigger notifications.
    - Must not appear in session completion.
    - Must not run active queries or subscriptions.
    - Must not affect loading state.
    - Must not appear in onboarding or Coach recommendations.
    "

[36mconst[39m weightedSignals [33m=[39m applyDecayAndWeight(signals)[33m;[39m [36mconst[39m aggregatedSignals [33m=[39m aggregateSignals(weightedSignals)[33m;[39m [36mconst[39m validatedProfile[33m;[39m } [36mfunction[39m applyDecayAndWeight(signals[33m:[39m [33mBehaviorSignal[39m[])[33m:[39m [33mBehaviorSignal[39m[] { [36mconst[39m now [33m=[39m [33mDate[39m[33m.[39mnow()[33m;[39m [36mreturn[39m signals[33m.[39mmap((signal) [33m=>[39m { [36mconst[39m ageMs [33m=[39m now [33m-[39m signal[33m.[39mtimestamp[33m;[39m [36mconst[39m ageDays [33m=[39m ageMs [33m/[39m ([35m1000[39m [33m*[39m [35m60[39m [33m*[39m [35m60[39m [33m*[39m [35m24[39m)[33m;[39m [36mconst[39m decayFactor [33m=[39m [33mDEFAULT_SIGNAL_CONFIG[39m[33m.[39mdecayFactors[signal[33m.[39msignalType] [33m||[39m [35m0.95[39m[33m;[39m [36mconst[39m decayMultiplier [33m=[39m [33mMath[39m[33m.[39mpow(decayFactor[33m,[39m ageDays)[33m;[39m [36mconst[39m weight [33m=[39m [33mDEFAULT_SIGNAL_CONFIG[39m[33m.[39msignalWeights[signal[33m.[39msignalType] [33m||[39m [35m0.7[39m[33m;[39m [36mconst[39m adjustedValue [33m=[39m signal[33m.[39mvalue [33m*[39m decayMultiplier[33m;[39m [36mconst[39m adjustedConfidence [33m=[39m signal[33m.[39mconfidence [33m*[39m weight[33m;[39m [36mreturn[39m { [33m...[39msignal[33m,[39m value[33m:[39m adjustedValue[33m,[39m confidence[33m:[39m adjustedConfidence }[33m;[39m })[33m;[39m } [36mfunction[39m aggregateSignals(signals[33m:[39m [33mBehaviorSignal[39m[])[33m:[39m [33mBehaviorSignal[39m[] { [36mconst[39m grouped [33m=[39m ([36mconst[39m [signalType[33m,[39m typeSignals] [36mof[39m grouped) { [36mconst[39m sorted [33m=[39m typeSignals[33m.[39msort((a[33m,[39m b) [33m=>[39m b[33m.[39mtimestamp [33m-[39m a[33m.[39mtimestamp)[33m;[39m [36mconst[39m mostRecent [33m=[39m sorted[[35m0[39m][33m![39m[33m;[39m [36mconst[39m recentWindow [33m=[39m [33m+[39m s[33m.[39mvalue [33m*[39m (recentWindow[33m.[39mlength [33m-[39m idx)[33m,[39m [35m0[39m)[33m;[39m [36mconst[39m weightSum [33m=[39m      [90m 2 |[39m [33mBOSS_PARTICIPATION[39m[33m:[39m [35m0.9[39m[33m,[39m [33mMORNING_PERSON[39m[33m:[39m [35m0.75[39m[33m,[39m [33mNIGHT_OWL[39m[33m:[39m      [90m 4 |[39m } [36mexport[39m [36minterface[39m [33mBehaviorAnalytics[39m { userId[33m:[39m string[33m;[39m timestamp[33m:[39m number[33m;[39m signalsCount[33m:[39m FAIL src/__tests__/final-release-source-truth.test.ts
  ● Docs — final release language › VEX_FINAL_RELEASE_SCOPE.md uses final-release language

    expect(received).not.toContain(expected) // indexOf

    Expected substring: not "Final Release Includes"
    Received string:        "# VEX Final Release Scope

    AI agents must read this file before editing Home, navigation, onboarding,
    session completion, premium, notifications, Coach Presence, Study/Deep Work,
    Boss, or feature availability.

    ## Product Identity

    VEX is a personalized Study + Focus execution OS. The final release is a
    personal execution loop, not a social game, economy, or feature museum.

    Primary loop:

    1. Onboarding selects goal and motivation style.
    2. Home adapts around one primary action.
    3. User starts a focus, study, or deep-work session.
    4. User completes the session.
    5. Coach Presence reflects, progress updates, and one next action appears.
    6. User has a clear reason to return tomorrow.

    ## Final Release Includes

    - Onboarding and motivation style selection.
    - Adaptive Home with one primary CTA.
    - Focus session start and completion.
    - Session completion ledger, streak, XP, and basic progress.
    - Basic Coach Presence.
    - Basic companion visual as the visual coach.
    - Study OS / Deep Work / Learning / Project Focus entry.
    - Subtle boss or momentum visual when relevant.
    - Basic settings, privacy, delete/export account paths.
    - Sentry-backed error capture.
    - RevenueCat-backed premium only when live billing is configured.

    ## Final Release Excludes

    These systems are archived/deactivated. Do not revive unless the user directly asks for that exact system by name:

    - shop
    - inventory
    - battle pass
    - wagers
    - rivals
    - squads/social
    - leaderboards
    - premium currency
    - advanced economy
    - guilds
    - community boss
    - seasonal/liveops systems

    ## Progressive Unlocking

    - Day 0: no full boss screen, no social, no shop, no economy, no premium hard sell.
    - First session complete: show proof, Coach Presence, progress, and next action.
    - Sessions 2-4: show rhythm and one small future preview.
    - Sessions 5-7: show a relevant path, not a wall of locked systems.
    - Power users: deeper systems may appear only through FeatureAvailability.

    FeatureAvailability is mandatory for routes, queries, notifications, entry
    points, event subscriptions, and background work.

    ## Home Density Rules

    - Home has one primary CTA.
    - Early Home has at most one spotlight.
    - Home must never route to unavailable features.
    - Coach and companion appear as one Coach Presence surface.
    - Boss is subtle for calm/study users and visible only for game-like/intense or
      later-stage users.
    - Study language adapts by primary goal:
      Study OS, Deep Work Plan, Learning OS, Project Focus Path, or Growth Path.

    ## Completion Source Of Truth

    - Core completion mutation happens once through the session-completion ledger.
    - UI display must not grant XP, rewards, currency, streaks, or boss damage.
    - Duplicate completion events must not duplicate rewards.
    - Optional feature effects run only when FeatureAvailability allows event
      subscription.
    - Optional failures are logged and shown as degraded, but completion still
      succeeds when core save succeeds.

    ## Premium Honesty

    Free VEX must include starting sessions, completing sessions, basic progress,
    basic Coach Presence, basic companion visual, and basic Study/Deep Work entry.

    Premium sells deeper personalization:

    - Deep Coach Memory.
    - Advanced Study / Deep Work OS.
    - Personal Progress Intelligence.
    - Visual identity.
    - Premium session modes.

    Never show fake billing, fake premium, fake plans, premium currency, or cheap
    \"upgrade now\" copy. If billing is not live, hide premium or show a clear
    unavailable state.

    ## Archived Feature Runtime Rules

    Every archived/deactivated feature must be fully inert at runtime:
    - Must not register routes.
    - Must not render Home cards.
    - Must not trigger notifications.
    - Must not appear in session completion.
    - Must not run active queries or subscriptions.
    - Must not affect loading state.
    - Must not appear in onboarding or Coach recommendations.
    "

    [0m [90m 79 |[39m     )[33m;[39m
     [90m 80 |[39m     expect(content)[33m.[39mtoContain([32m'Final Release'[39m)[33m;[39m
    [31m[1m>[22m[39m[90m 81 |[39m     expect(content)[33m.[39mnot[33m.[39mtoContain([32m'Final Release Includes'[39m)[33m;[39m
